metadata.description: User-triggered one-off actions (interactables) presented in Admin Updates UI

interactables.name: Migrate Gogs to Forgejo
interactables.description: One-time migration: replace Gogs with Forgejo (Git server). Run when you are ready to switch. Update modules will then use Forgejo only (group ladder).

interactables.name: Debian 12 → 13 in-place upgrade
interactables.description: One-time in-place upgrade from Bookworm to Trixie. Backs up APT sources, switches suite to trixie, runs apt full-upgrade, updates flat symlinks for PostgreSQL and Piwigo PHP-FPM paths, adds trixie-backports. Reboot required. After reboot, systems on the flat symlink backend need no separate Postgres or Piwigo PHP migration. Only shown on Debian 12 (bookworm).

interactables.name: PostgreSQL 15 → 17 migration
interactables.description: WARNING: May break your shit; backup first. Only needed if you are not on the flat symlink backend (Debian 12→13 already updates symlinks). In-place upgrade via pg_upgrade. Stops PostgreSQL and dependent services, migrates cluster to 17, updates systemd unit. Only shown after Debian 12→13 has been run. On Trixie, PostgreSQL 17 is the default; script installs it if missing.

interactables.name: PHP-FPM migration to default PHP
interactables.description: WARNING: Can fuck your shit up; backup first. Only needed if you are not on the flat symlink backend (Debian 12→13 already updates Piwigo PHP-FPM symlinks). Migrates Piwigo pool only, repoints flat symlinks, installs HOMESERVER php-fpm.service, disables distro phpX.Y-fpm. Only shown after Debian 12→13 has been run.
